h3: Education and jobs for Veterans and military members
Health and wellness for Veterans and military

sections.heading: Veteran services and benefits
items: Financial support, healthcare, disability and other benefits for Veterans of the Canadian Armed Forces or the RCMP , and their families.

sections.heading: Military services and benefits
items: Pay, pension, transition, housing, education, training and health services and benefits for CAF members and their families.

sections.heading: RCMP services and benefits
items: Pay, pension, benefits, programs and services for RCMP members and their families.

sections.heading: Education and jobs for Veterans and military members
items: Job opportunities and career support for former and current members of the Canadian Armed Forces.

sections.heading: Health and wellness for Veterans and military
items: Physical and mental health support and services for Veterans, military members, and their families, including treatment for PTSD.

sections.heading: Canadian Armed Forces
items: Military history, ranks, orders, equipment, operations, medals.
